data.title: Metrics Master Income Trust Reports NTA Backing
data.description:
An announcement from Metrics Master Income Trust ( (AU:MXT) ) is now available.

The Metrics Master Income Trust announced its unaudited Net Tangible Asset Backing per share as of April 16, 2025, providing insights into its financial position. This announcement reflects the trust’s ongoing commitment to delivering target returns while preserving investor capital, reinforcing its strategic role in Australia’s bank-dominated corporate loan market.

More about Metrics Master Income Trust

Metrics Master Income Trust operates in the financial services industry, primarily focusing on providing monthly cash income, low risk of capital loss, and portfolio diversification through actively managing diversified loan portfolios in Australia’s corporate loan market. The trust is managed by The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, part of the Perpetual group, which offers funds management, financial advisory, and trustee services.

Average Trading Volume: 2,232,342

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Lintec Corporation Announces Change in Director Candidate
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Lintec ( (JP:7966) ).

Lintec Corporation announced a change in its candidate for Outside Director, replacing Akira Sebe with Takanori Sano from Nippon Paper Industries Co., Ltd. This change reflects Lintec’s strategic move to strengthen its corporate governance and align its leadership with industry expertise, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and stakeholder confidence.

More about Lintec

Lintec Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing adhesive-related products. The company is known for its innovative solutions in label materials, specialty papers, and adhesive tapes, catering to a diverse range of markets globally.

data.title: Cobalt Blue Holdings Issues Shares to Staff as Remuneration
data.description:
Cobalt Blue Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:COB) ) has issued an update.

Cobalt Blue Holdings Ltd. has announced the issuance of 171,026 ordinary fully paid shares to its staff as part of their base remuneration package. This move is part of the company’s strategy to incentivize and retain talent, potentially enhancing its operational efficiency and market competitiveness.

More about Cobalt Blue Holdings Ltd.

Cobalt Blue Holdings Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of cobalt resources. The company is primarily involved in producing cobalt, a critical component in battery technology, and aims to supply the growing demand in the renewable energy and electric vehicle markets.

data.title: Vmoto Limited Announces Details for Upcoming Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Vmoto Limited ( (AU:VMT) ) has issued an update.

Vmoto Limited has announced the details for its upcoming annual general meeting, scheduled for May 21, 2025, in Perth, Western Australia. The company emphasizes the importance of the meeting for shareholders and provides instructions for proxy voting, highlighting the shift towards digital access to meeting materials, which reflects a broader industry trend towards sustainability and efficiency.

More about Vmoto Limited

Vmoto Limited operates in the electric vehicle industry, focusing primarily on the production and distribution of electric scooters and motorcycles. The company targets both the consumer market and business-to-business sectors, aiming to provide sustainable and efficient transportation solutions.

data.title: PM Capital Global Opportunities Fund Reports on Market Challenges and Opportunities
data.description:
PM Capital Global Opportunities Fund Ltd. ( (AU:PGF) ) has provided an update.

In its March 2025 quarterly report, PM Capital Global Opportunities Fund Limited highlights the impact of direct tariffs on its portfolio and discusses the effects of market uncertainties such as consumer sentiment, inflation, and corporate capital expenditure. The company also identifies selective opportunities arising from market dislocation, which could influence its strategic positioning and offer potential benefits to stakeholders.

More about PM Capital Global Opportunities Fund Ltd.

PM Capital Global Opportunities Fund Limited operates in the global equities asset class. The company focuses on identifying and investing in global market opportunities, aiming for long-term growth with a suggested investment time frame of over seven years. It is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code PGF.

data.title: Kina Securities Announces Director’s Share Acquisition
data.description:
Kina Securities Ltd. ( (AU:KSL) ) has issued an announcement.

Kina Securities Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest in securities, specifically involving Ivan Vidovich. The change includes the acquisition of 14,009 ordinary shares through the company’s Dividend Reinvestment Plan, increasing the director’s total shareholding. This move reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning the interests of its directors with those of its shareholders, potentially strengthening stakeholder confidence.

More about Kina Securities Ltd.

Kina Securities Limited operates in the financial services industry, providing a range of banking and financial products. The company focuses on delivering comprehensive financial solutions, including banking services and investment opportunities, primarily within the regions it serves.

data.title: Quickstep Holdings’ Acquisition by ASDAM Becomes Effective
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Quickstep Holdings Limited ( (AU:QHL) ).

Quickstep Holdings Limited announced that the scheme of arrangement with ASDAM Operations Pty Ltd to acquire all issued shares is now legally effective. As a result, trading of Quickstep shares on the ASX will be suspended, and shareholders will receive $0.575 per share held at the record date, with the implementation expected by early May 2025.

More about Quickstep Holdings Limited

Quickstep Holdings Limited is the largest independent aerospace composite business in Australia.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $25.96M

data.title: ABB Reports Strong Q1 2025 Results and Plans Robotics Spin-Off
data.description:
ABB Ltd ( (CH:ABBN) ) has provided an announcement.

ABB Ltd reported a strong start to 2025 with a 3% increase in orders and a 1% rise in revenues for the first quarter, despite a challenging global business environment. The company achieved a 20.2% operational EBITA margin and announced plans to spin off its Robotics division to optimize value creation. ABB is also investing $120 million to expand its U.S. manufacturing sites, reflecting its commitment to local production and the growing demand for electrification technologies. The company continues to focus on sustainability, nearing its 2030 CO2e emissions reduction target and maintaining a low Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate.

More about ABB Ltd

ABB is a global technology leader in electrification and automation, enabling a more sustainable and resource-efficient future. By leveraging its engineering and digitalization expertise, ABB helps industries enhance performance, efficiency, productivity, and sustainability. The company has a history of over 140 years and employs around 110,000 people worldwide. ABB’s shares are listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm.

Average Trading Volume: 578,969

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Yamatane Corporation Announces Stock Split and Amendments to Boost Share Liquidity
data.description:
Yamatane Corporation ( (JP:9305) ) has provided an announcement.

Yamatane Corporation has announced a two-for-one stock split to lower the investment unit price, aiming to broaden its investor base and enhance share liquidity. The company will also amend its Articles of Incorporation and increase the total number of shares that can be repurchased, potentially impacting its market operations and shareholder value.

More about Yamatane Corporation

Yamatane Corporation operates in the logistics and transportation industry, focusing on providing comprehensive logistics solutions. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and is known for its efforts to enhance investor accessibility and share liquidity.
